instruction: Restore the green checkmark on the language icon to where it should be. (subtler offset — read the original coordinates carefully).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/language.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m10.5 21 5.25-11.25L21 21m-9-3h7.5M3 5.621a48.474 48.474 0 0 1 6-.371m0 0c1.12 0 2.233.038 3.334.114M9 5.25V3m3.334 2.364C11.176 10.658 7.69 15.08 3 17.502m9.334-12.138c.896.061 1.785.147 2.666.257m-4.589 8.495a18.023 18.023 0 0 1-3.827-5.802"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="80,24 90,34 106,18" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/language.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m10.5 21 5.25-11.25L21 21m-9-3h7.5M3 5.621a48.474 48.474 0 0 1 6-.371m0 0c1.12 0 2.233.038 3.334.114M9 5.25V3m3.334 2.364C11.176 10.658 7.69 15.08 3 17.502m9.334-12.138c.896.061 1.785.147 2.666.257m-4.589 8.495a18.023 18.023 0 0 1-3.827-5.802"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
